description_long: This kiosk features a modern, open design with a prominent wood-textured arch that forms both a partial roof and a side wall, creating a welcoming entryway. The main structure is composed of wood paneling with metallic trim, and the floor area is defined by a dark, matte surface. One side wall displays a large printed image of a latte with the phrase 'Better latte than never,' while the other side incorporates shelving for product display or storage. The rear section includes a vertical column with a logo and additional branding. The kiosk is open on one side, allowing easy access for customers and staff, and is designed for use in public or commercial urban environments. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on natural wood finishes and clean lines.
description: A modern, wood-paneled kiosk with a curved archway, open entry, branded signage, and integrated shelving, designed for urban commercial use.
description_view_0: This view highlights the open entryway formed by the curved wood arch, the shelving on the right wall, and the vertical branded column at the rear.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the large printed coffee image and slogan on the side panel, as well as the continuous wood texture and metallic trim.
description_view_2: The rear view showcases the full expanse of the branded side panel with the coffee image and slogan, and the vertical column with logo.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the open interior, shelving, and the clean, minimalist design of the kiosk's main structure.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo; large printed coffee image and slogan on side panel, logo on vertical column, all integrated into the structure.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open archway entry at the front.
attribute_roof_design: Curved, partial roof formed by a continuous wood-textured arch; flat and minimalist with no overhangs or skylights.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with rustic wood accents.
